# transferMode

**Instance Property**

Determines how the scanned content is provided to the delegate.

## Declaration

```swift
var transferMode: IKScannerDeviceViewTransferMode { get set }
```

## Discussion

The supported constants are defined in [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKScannerDeviceViewTransferMode].

## Configuring Downloading

- **displaysDownloadsDirectoryControl**: Determines whether the downloads directory control is displayed.
- **downloadsDirectory**: The directory where scans are saved.
- **documentName**: Returns the document name.
